projectDescription: A free, local-first personal health intelligence platform that unifies blood work, DNA, wearables, and light exposure into a single dashboard with AI-powered analysis — no account required.
keyFeatures: AI-powered PDF lab import — any format, language, or country
287+ biomarkers across 17 categories with interactive trend charts
DNA raw data analysis — 47 curated SNPs, APOE haplotype, 39 mtDNA haplogroups
Wearable integrations — Oura, Fitbit, Withings, Polar, Apple Health
AI chat with 6 provider options including fully local and privacy-first choices
Custom Knowledge Base (RAG) to ground AI analysis in your own documents
9 lifestyle context cards feeding all AI interpretations
Light & Sun photobiology tracking with atmospheric UV data
Agent Access — MCP-compatible API for AI coding agents and bots
Cross-device sync via end-to-end encrypted CRDT relay
Menstrual cycle tracking with phase-aware reference ranges
Specialty lab support — OAT, fatty acids, HTMA, and more
Multi-profile support for tracking family members or clients
publicApiSurface: Agent Access token (Settings → Data → Agent Access)
External server Knowledge Base: POST /query (Bearer auth, OpenAI-compatible embedding protocol)
Custom AI provider: any OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint
Self-hosted sync relay: wss:// Evolu relay WebSocket
PWA installable on desktop and mobile
JSON export/import for full data portability
